raw:
{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 5,
    "R1.2": 5,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The revised version addresses the statelessness contradiction by dropping the histograms and treating them as offline-fit constants, and tightens the contribution claim by separating the ablations and reporting both.",
    "R1.2": "The revised version improves logical consistency by providing a clear motivation for why routing is non-trivial and specifying the accuracy metric (recall@10) and threshold τ.",
    "RX.1": "The revised version discloses uncertainty in the ablation split, stating that it's a reconstruction consistent with the original draft's claim, but not having actual numbers.",
    "RX.3": "The revised version adheres to scope by separating the two components (router and advisor) and reporting results for routing-only, advising-only, and combined configurations.",
    "RX.4": "The revised version avoids downstream harm by releasing the trace, labels, and predictor weights to support reproduction.",
    "RX.5": "The revised version provides provenance and traceability by specifying the accuracy metric (recall@10) and threshold τ, and providing a clear description of the closed-form decision rule."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.2": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.7,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.95,
    "RX.5": 0.85
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The revised version addresses the statelessness contradiction by dropping the histograms and treating them as offline-fit constants, and tightens the contribution claim by separating the ablations and reporting both.
rationale.R1.2: The revised version improves logical consistency by providing a clear motivation for why routing is non-trivial and specifying the accuracy metric (recall@10) and threshold τ.
rationale.RX.1: The revised version discloses uncertainty in the ablation split, stating that it's a reconstruction consistent with the original draft's claim, but not having actual numbers.
rationale.RX.3: The revised version adheres to scope by separating the two components (router and advisor) and reporting results for routing-only, advising-only, and combined configurations.
rationale.RX.4: The revised version avoids downstream harm by releasing the trace, labels, and predictor weights to support reproduction.
rationale.RX.5: The revised version provides provenance and traceability by specifying the accuracy metric (recall@10) and threshold τ, and providing a clear description of the closed-form decision rule.
